before: public async Task<Result> ProcessOrderAsync(OrderRequest req){ if(req==null) throw new ArgumentNullException(nameof(req)); if(req.Items.Count==0) return Result.Fail("empty"); var customer = await _db.Customers.FindAsync(req.CustomerId); if(customer==null) return Result.Fail("customer not found"); int total=0; foreach(var item in req.Items){ total += item.Price * item.Qty; } var order = new Order{ Customer=customer, Total=total }; await _db.Orders.AddAsync(order); await _db.SaveChangesAsync(); await _notifier.NotifyAsync(order); return Result.Ok(order.Id); }
after: private static Result ValidateRequest(OrderRequest req){ if (req == null) throw new ArgumentNullException(nameof(req)); if (req.Items.Count == 0) return Result.Fail("empty"); return Result.Ok(); } private static int CalculateTotal(IEnumerable<OrderItem> items) => items.Sum(i => i.Price * i.Qty); public async Task<Result> ProcessOrderAsync(OrderRequest req){ var validation = ValidateRequest(req); if (!validation.IsSuccess) return validation; var customer = await _db.Customers.FindAsync(req.CustomerId); if (customer == null) return Result.Fail("customer not found"); var order = new Order { Customer = customer, Total = CalculateTotal(req.Items) }; await _db.Orders.AddAsync(order); await _db.SaveChangesAsync(); await _notifier.NotifyAsync(order); return Result.Ok(order.Id); }
why_safe: Validation and total calculation extracted into synchronous helpers; async chain and save/notify order preserved.
